candidates.why: This is the operating D&A line relevant to the COGS bucket, but it appears as a component under the selected parent row 'Cost of Operating Revenue', which is the full direct cost row. Adding it separately would likely double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is SG&A-related D&A, not COGS-related, so it does not belong in COGS_DA.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of Operating Revenue'. The explicit depreciation row appears to be a component of that operating cost bucket, not a separate same-level expense to add later.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is the operating D&A line relevant to SG&A, but it appears to be a component within the selected SG&A bucket rather than a separate same-level line item. Since the selected SG&A row is an excluding-R&D parent bucket, adding this separately would likely double count.
This is COGS-related D&A, not SG&A-related, so it does not belong in XSGA_DA.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket is 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses'. The explicit SG&A depreciation row appears to be embedded as a component of that SG&A expense bucket. No separate R&D expense row is present, and there is no basis to add any D&A row separately without risking double count.
